author: @ZigZagHockey
text:
Robert, I use both red and black iron oxide to pigment resins and I have of course spilled some of each on my living room carpet. I have given up trying to remove it but, it looks as if your product may do the job. You have a customer here.

Regards ,

author: @mkhamlach
text: Hi Rob, is it possible to have your ecofoam?

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: +Mo Kha not at the moment mate - i have shelved it for now as i am pretty busy on other stuff - i will pick it up soon though

replies.author: @mkhamlach
replies.text: +Robert Murray-Smith  OK Mate, sure you are busy and I was shamed to ask for it while you are working on your big project. I am interested by distributing the ecofoam.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: no worries mate - i need to do something about it and that need is growing lol

replies.author: @mkhamlach
replies.text: +Robert Murray-Smith lol   OK Mate. WE need the needs

author: @abi7627
text: Hi Robert, I've been trying to get on to the site in order to purchase some of this for my car seats.  Is it still available?  I have two dogs who love the woods so much, my rear seat could support half the forest with the amount of soil all over it!  I'd rather buy from & support your amazing research than further line the pockets of the likes of Glaxo!

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: +Secret Squirrel I need to make some more for a friend - i'll dig out the recipe - it'll be a couple of weeks though as i am out of the country again from tomorrow but when i do  i am happy just to send you some

replies.author: @abi7627
replies.text: Wow! That's incredibly generous Robert, thank you so much! A gentleman & a scholar :-).

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: +Secret Squirrel no worries - write to me at robertmurraysmith64@gmail.com

author: @K9JT
text: "...actually cleans your carpet without dissolving it!" Haha, love it!

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: i am a happy guy lol

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: it's just i have spent a stupid amount of effort trying to clean that damned carpet lol

author: @roidroid
text:
This could replace the chemicals that wet vacuum cleaners use (eg: Vax).
Much more healthy

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: i plan on trying it with the vax

author: @FredGandt
text:
HOLY SH*T!!
I literally burst out laughing when you started scrubbing!!
That's truly amazing O.O
As you say _"A cleaner that actually works"_ :-)

author: @Zerkbern
text: PS:  Link to your shop?  (I should have bookmarked it.  Ugh.)

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: link to my site is in description

author: @Zerkbern
text:
Wow.  Looks great!  My family has been using your hand cleaner for a couple of weeks now and I must say it is wonderful.  As you said, it works great ALL BY ITSELF without even using water, which is great for a washup in my garage where I have no sink. 

We keep a foamer by the kitchen sink for routine hand washing. 

You sold me, mate, and I'll be having a go at the carpet cleaner as well.

Cheers from the USA,

Z
